reviews.reviewTitle: The clean and tranquil hotel environment, along with friendly service, made me enjoy my stay. Highly recommended.
reviews.originalTitle: Lingkungan hotel yang bersih dan tenang, disertai pelayanan yang ramah membuat saya betah menginap. Sangat direkomendasikan
reviews.originalComment: Sebagai hotel ekonomis di Banda Aceh, Grand Mahoni Hotel menghadirkan pelayanan yang ramah dengan kenyamanan yang cukup baik untul kebutuhan dasar tamu. Lokasinya strategis, pelayanan restoran sangat ramah dengan sarapan prasmanan yang lezat. Meski fasilitasnya  sederhana,hotel ini dapat menjadi opsi favkrit karena harganyavterjangkau dan suasana yang bersih dan tenang
reviews.reviewComments: As an economy hotel in Banda Aceh, Grand Mahoni Hotel offers friendly service with good comfort for guests' basic needs. It has a strategic location, very friendly restaurant service, and a delicious buffet breakfast. Although its facilities are simple, this hotel can be a favorite option because of its affordable prices and a clean and quiet atmosphere.
reviews.roomTypeName: Superior Double or Twin Room without Balcony

reviews.originalComment: Grand Mahoni Hotel merupakan salah satu Hotel yang berada di dekat Pusat Kota Banda Aceh, tempatnya Nyaman, Aman dan Tenang dan Para Stafnya Juga sangat ramah²....namun awal kedatangan kami ke sini, kami hampir kecewa berat begitu pintu lift lantai 3 terbuka. Saya pikir hotel ini masih belum rampung dibangun, memang belum rampung sepenuhnya!! namun ketika saya keluar lift saya mulai tersenyum ternyata sdh cukup baik. Terimakasih Grand Mahoni Hotel.
reviews.reviewComments: Grand Mahoni Hotel is one of the hotels located near the center of Banda Aceh, with a comfortable, safe, and quiet atmosphere, and the staff is also very friendly.... however, upon our arrival here, we were almost very disappointed when the elevator door on the 3rd floor opened. I thought this hotel was still under construction; in fact, it was not fully completed!! But when I exited the elevator, I started to smile because it turned out to be quite good. Thank you, Grand Mahoni Hotel.
reviews.roomTypeName: Superior Double or Twin Room without Balcony

reviews.reviewComments: Fasilitas nya lengkap deket pasar tradisional dan jualan mie aceh.. best lah

reviews.originalComment: Sangat memuaskan dan belum mengecewakan, fasilitas dan pelayanan sangat luar biasa, sangat rekomen buat yang mau situasi tenang saat menginap
reviews.reviewComments: Very satisfying and has not been disappointing, the facilities and service are exceptional, highly recommended for those who want a calm situation while staying.

reviews.reviewTitle: Está bien pero el wifi no va muy bien y la cama no era muy cómoda
reviews.reviewPositives: Estaba muy limpio, el personal era agradable
reviews.reviewNegatives: El wifi iba muy mal o incluso ni iba y la cama no era muy cómoda

reviews.reviewComments: Milih hotel ini karena dekat dari Masjid Baiturrahman dan Museum Tsunami, harganya untuk 250rb bisa dibilang affordable, awalnya ga berharap lebih tapi ternyata kamar dan fasilitasnya lebih dari cukup. Tempatnya juga strategis dekat ke masjid besar lainnya, dekat ke beberapa cafe dan pusat kuliner lainnya. Waktu mau check out, driver kami nunggu kurang lebih 1 jam, masuk ke area resto dikasih free coffee. Staffnya juga ramah.

reviews.reviewComments: Milih hotel ini karena dekat dari Masjid Baiturrahman dan Museum Tsunami, harganya untuk 250rb bisa dibilang affordable, awalnya ga berharap lebih tapi ternyata kamar dan fasilitasnya lebih dari cukup. Tempatnya juga strategis dekat ke masjid besar lainnya, dekat ke beberapa cafe dan pusat kuliner lainnya. Waktu mau check out, driver kami nunggu kurang lebih 1 jam, masuk ke area resto dikasih free coffee. Staffnya juga ramah.

Good value including a substantial breakfast. The cafe was nice for dinner too. Close to Aceh National Museum. Really lovely staff with  a warm and friendly welcome. 
Room was adequate - a little bit musty but had a/c and a kettle.

reviews.originalComment: Very affordable, good breakfast..indomart just few meters. At the back of hotel have some shops including breakfast stall
reviews.reviewComments: Very affordable, good breakfast..indomart just a few meters away. At the back of the hotel, there are some shops including a breakfast stall.
The room was clean, the location was great, the stuff very nice and helpful.  The wifi could have been better though.

reviews.reviewTitle: Right place to get some vacation
reviews.reviewComments: Everything's gonna be wonderful, right place to go with your family

reviews.reviewNegatives: Er werd verbouwd en ‘s ochtends begonnen ze al vroeg met heel veel herrie. Het ontbijt was een beetje karig en het personeel spreekt eigenlijk geen Engels.

reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, not noisy, and comfortable. It's also not far to find food. The service is good as well.

reviews.reviewPositives: Clean room, nice staff, relaxing eating area, has laundry service, good location.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Items we ordered from restaurant lacked taste, like there's no salt or seasoning. Breakfast was alright though.
